title: Reflex Need vs Want
subtitlePlaying: Round {{current}}/{{total}}: Test your knowledge about needs vs wants!
subtitleReady: Test your knowledge about needs vs wants!
readyTitle: Ready to Test Your Needs vs Wants Knowledge?
readyDescription: Answer questions about the difference between needs and wants.
readyInfo: You have {{total}} questions with {{seconds}} seconds each!
resultGreatDescription: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} questions correct!
resultGreatLesson: Lesson: Needs are essential for survival and learning, while wants are things we'd like to have but don't need!
resultKeepDescription: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} questions correct. Remember, needs are essential items like food, clothes, and school supplies!
resultKeepTip: Tip: Needs are things you must have to survive and learn, like food, clothes, and school supplies.

questions.question: What is a need for staying healthy?
Which item is essential for learning?
What do you need in cold weather?
What is needed to get to school?
